utility_evaluation.REASONING:
The required format has 5 items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. Now check the final plan:
- health_coverage: Includes both physical and mental health insurance with named plans and costs, plus a combined total. This matches the requirement of physical and mental health insurance with costs. Fully specified.
- property_coverage: Provides home/contents insurance description and both monthly and annual costs. Fully specified.
- travel_coverage: Provides travel insurance description and both monthly and annual costs. Fully specified.
- additional_services: Lists enhancement service with monthly cost and an annual cost line. Fully specified.
- total_budget: Provides complete monthly and annual totals. Fully specified.
All 5 required items are present and include the necessary cost details.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan lists four items: LifeFirst Standard Plan (physical health), PrimeCare Premium for mental health, EliteHome Premium Coverage with Home Security System add-on, and EliteTravel Premium Plan. I matched each to the exact names in the ground-truth ratings. LifeFirst Standard Plan appears under primary_health_coverage.physical_health with rating 8. PrimeCare Premium for mental health corresponds to primary_health_coverage.mental_health 'PrimeCare Premium Plan' with rating 10. EliteHome Premium Coverage corresponds to property_protection.home_content 'EliteHome Premium Coverage' with rating 10. EliteTravel Premium Plan corresponds to mobility_coverage.travel_insurance 'EliteTravel Premium Plan' with rating 10. The 'Home Security System add-on' and 'Executive Insurance Concierge service' are not distinct rated items in the ground truth, so they are not included in the mapping.
